message:
test(unit): expand runtime.rs inline tests (47→112) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 65 new unit tests for observation runtime covering:
- Pure functions: bytes_to_mib (zero, 1MiB, fractional, large),
  epoch_ms/epoch_ms_u64 (positive, consistency), duration_ms_u64
- Internal helpers: record_bounded_sample (add, capacity enforcement),
  percentile_from_samples (empty, single, two values, unsorted)
- event_counts_as_activity: all 6 activity event variants
- snapshot_trigger_from_detection: 8 additional event types (critical
  severity, usage.reached, error.network, auth.error, session
  compaction/summary/end, resume_hint, thinking, approval_needed,
  unknown returns None)
- snapshot_trigger_from_user_var: cmd_start, preexec, cmd_end, postexec,
  None event_type, unknown event_type
- snapshot_trigger_from_event: pane discovered/disappeared (state
  transition), segment/gap/workflow_started (returns None)
- detection_to_stored_event: warning severity, critical severity,
  dedupe_key format
- RuntimeConfig: 8 default field validations, clone
- ResizeWatchdogSeverity: Copy/Eq, Debug format
- derive_resize_degradation_ladder: Healthy→FullQuality,
  Critical→CorrectnessGuarded
- ResizeWatchdogAssessment: Debug, Eq/Clone
- RuntimeLockMemoryTelemetrySnapshot: Clone, Debug
- Constants: threshold ordering, positive limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
